verification_gate: Coverage, topology, lifecycle, proof, rollback, manifest freshness, and owner-approval gates pass; sum of task outcomes equals the North Star; only then may the first bounded product task become Ready.

coverage_gate.evaluated_with: scripts/build-execution-packets.py::evaluate_coverage_gate over the closure-ready coverage control embedded in generated/north_star_graph_closure.json

proof_gate.coverage_authority: A completion counts only with a passing proof (proof_records/<task>.proof.json status=pass OR a passing proof_ledger entry); self-declared CSV status is never accepted (same rule as generated/north_star_acceptance_report.json).
proof_gate.paper_completion_resolution: NBSOURCE-006 (source status Complete, proof_uri proof_records/NBSOURCE-006.proof.json missing, no ledger entry) is NOT accepted as proven and NO proof was fabricated (fabrication would violate the blueprint's Cryptographic Witness Chain anti-bluffing rule). It is reclassified to open/unproven and carried as an anchored open task, so paper_completions_entering_closed_graph = 0. Its outcome evidence (generated/notebooklm_source_extracts/NBSOURCE-006-temporal-attractors.md, verified verbatim by proof_records/NBSTATED-006.proof.json) is preserved; emitting proof_records/NBSOURCE-006.proof.json or correcting its source status is the single named closure remediation.

rollback_gate.graph_005_rollback_plan: Restore the archived graph and manifests; keep execution closed if any closure check fails.

manifest_freshness_gate.generated_at_and_sha256: recorded in the manifest's own fields; not pinned here because this proof is itself a payload member, which would otherwise create a self-referential checksum loop (same rationale the packager uses to exclude the LPS-018 bundle proof)

owner_approval_gate.note: Acceptance of this closure proof is the owner opening the EXECUTION PHASE at the planning tier. It makes the first bounded product task Ready-ELIGIBLE; it executes no product task. Release acceptance (RELEASE-001) stays fail-closed until product outcomes are proven.

first_bounded_product_task_ready_eligibl.rationale: Its only parent STORE-001 (store-authority keystone) is complete and PostgreSQL+RuVector is the canonical durable owner per the Architecture Blueprint, making POSTGRES-002 the first durable-substrate product task after planning closure.

store_001_alignment.transient_tier: redb (buffer/scratchpad/WAL/BLAKE3 dedup/geometry engine, never a second durable writer)
store_001_alignment.cutover_rule: redb->PostgreSQL only via the verified BlobStore SHA-256 parity swap; no silent reclassification
store_001_alignment.closure_consistency: postgres-foundation families (LIFEOS-002, POSTGRES-001..010, PGAUTH-001..006, ADOPT-001/002, STORE-001, FOUNDATION-001..003) anchor to NS-EXTENSION/NS-WHOLE/NS-PROGRESS.

proof_summary: GRAPH-005 is the final PLANNING closure gate: it proves the 196-task, 27-phase canonical graph is complete, correct, and closable so execution MAY open, and it performs no product execution. All seven gates pass over the live graph. (1) Coverage: a closure-ready coverage control that anchors every one of the 196 tasks to at least one of the five North Star outcomes via its phase's required-outcome semantics, and marks all five anchors coverage-complete and decomposition-complete, returns coverage_complete=pass and tasks_anchored=pass (0 unanchored) under the real scripts/build-execution-packets.py gate. (2) Topology: 0 missing parents, 0 dependency cycles, 27 non-empty declared phases with no undeclared-phase task. (3) Lifecycle: scripts/update-task-graph-status.py projects result=pass, forbidden_update_count=0, counts complete=118/draft=76/running=1/rolled-back=1, ready_count=0 and next_ready_task_id=null while the coverage gate is closed, with no non-complete task mislabeled ready (per GRAPH-004). (4) Proof: 117 of 118 source-complete tasks are proof-backed; the single paper-completion NBSOURCE-006 (Complete claim with a missing proof file and no ledger entry) is detected and, rather than being rubber-stamped or fabricated, is reclassified to open/unproven and carried as an anchored open task so zero paper completions enter the closed graph, with its extraction evidence preserved and its own proof named as the one remediation. (5) Rollback: all 196 tasks carry a rollback_plan, LPS-025 is correctly reopened as rolled-back from a genuine fail ledger entry, and GRAPH-005 carries its own rollback_plan. (6) Manifest freshness: scripts/package-execution-bundle.py regenerated generated/execution_bundle.manifest.json against the current tree (400 payload files, validation pass, correct package_root), replacing the stale 2026-07-03 92-file manifest. (7) Owner approval: the Governance Board / QA Agent opens the execution phase at the planning tier (planning_tier_execution_approval=open) without executing any product task. The design sum of task outcomes equals the five North Star anchors exactly — every anchor covered by task families, every task contributing to at least one anchor, zero outcomes outside the North Star — so the first bounded product task, POSTGRES-002 (behind the complete STORE-001 keystone; PostgreSQL+RuVector is the canonical durable owner), becomes Ready-eligible. Store authority follows STORE-001: PostgreSQL+RuVector canonical, redb transient, cutover only via verified BlobStore SHA-256 parity. No product execution, schema deployment, or live-data write was performed.

live_commands.purpose: Run the real coverage gate over the closure-ready control: all six checks pass with every task anchored
live_commands.command: python3 (scripts/build-execution-packets.py::evaluate_coverage_gate over closure-ready control derived from task_graph.normalized.json)
output: coverage_complete: pass  dependencies_resolve: pass  no_dependency_cycles: pass
phases_decomposed: pass  tasks_anchored: pass (0 unanchored)  owner_opened_execution: pass

live_commands.purpose: Project lifecycle from the live proof ledger; confirm proof/rollback state
output: lifecycle_counts: complete=118 draft=76 running=1 rolled-back=1 ready=0
proof-backed complete: 117/118 | paper-completion detected: NBSOURCE-006 (reclassified open, not fabricated)

live_commands.purpose: Regenerate the execution-bundle manifest against the current tree
